headline: Air Products to Showcase Technology Solutions for Sustainable Iron and Steel Production at AISTech2026
summary: Air Products (NYSE:APD) will showcase industrial gas solutions for all phases of iron and steel production at AISTech2026 from May 4-7 at the David L. Lawrence Convention Center in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

headline: This Caterpillar Analyst Is No Longer Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Friday

headline: BMO Capital Upgrades Air Products to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $360
summary: BMO Capital  analyst John McNulty   upgrades Air Products (NYSE:APD) from Market Perform to Outperform and raises the price target from $325 to $360.
